## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` remains concise.
- [ ] References were updated instead of bloating `SKILL.md`, where appropriate.
- [ ] `source-map.md` was updated if new official sources or version-sensitive guidance were added.
- [ ] Templates remain safe by default.
- [ ] Scripts are local-first and non-destructive.
- [ ] `npm run validate:skill` passed.
- [ ] `npm run smoke` passed.
- [ ] No official documentation was copied wholesale.
- [ ] No secrets, local config, dependency folders, or generated junk were committed.

## Notes

Mention any checks that could not be run and why.
